name: Tropfkrapfen (Drop Donuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the egg yolks and whole egg; blend well.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together all dry ingredients except the confectioners' sugar.
4. Add the dry mixture to the creamed mixture, alternating with buttermilk, until just combined.
5. Heat oil for frying to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough into the hot oil, frying a few at a time to maintain the fat temperature.
7. Fry until golden brown on all sides.
8. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
9. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar before serving.
